MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHAN, CAROLYN YEE HA AS TO DEFENDANT TOM, DEBRA ANN HUNG, JANET K HUNG, ANOTONIO K CERDA, MICHAEL CERDA, LENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2017 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, CAROLYN YEE HA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TOM, DEBRA ANN HUNG, JANET K HUNG, ANOTONIO K CERDA, MICHAEL CERDA, LENA 1366-1368 17TH AVENUE HOA AT THE PARTIES' REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANTS, JANET K. HUNG, ANTONIO K. HUNG, MICHAEL CEDRIA, LENA CEDRIA AND DEBRA ANNE TOM, ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AND THE 1366-1368 17TH AVENUE HOA IS ADDED AS THE SOLE DEFENDANT WHO WAIVES SERVICE AND NOTICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
